query_strategy: Multiple YouTube search.list requests, each targeting a specific media intent.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find explanatory video, documentary context, archival footage, or scene history.
query_candidates.q: breakbeat DJing Bronx block parties 1974 1976 documentary

request_params.q: breakbeat DJing Bronx block parties 1974 1976 documentary

query_candidates.reason: The event is about a scene practice spreading through parties and parks, which fits documentary context.
review_risks: Check that results address Bronx party practice or breakbeat DJing rather than later breakbeat genres.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find a DJ set, break mix, party mix, turntablism demonstration, or historically framed mix.
query_candidates.q: early hip hop breakbeat DJ mix Bronx block party 1974 1976

request_params.q: early hip hop breakbeat DJ mix Bronx block party 1974 1976

query_candidates.reason: The event centers on breakbeat DJ practice, so a historically framed mix is a strong sound-context candidate.
review_risks: Use it as sound context, not as documentation of a specific party.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find context about a relevant venue, club, block, park, neighborhood, or performance space.
query_candidates.q: Cedar Park Bronx block parties early hip hop 1974 1976

request_params.q: Cedar Park Bronx block parties early hip hop 1974 1976

query_candidates.reason: The event references parks and community spaces, with Cedar Park as the associated place.
review_risks: Verify that Cedar Park or Bronx park context is connected to early hip-hop culture.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find a YouTube playlist, mix, or curated song collection that matches the event context.
query_candidates.q: early hip hop breakbeat block party playlist Bronx 1974 1976

request_params.q: early hip hop breakbeat block party playlist Bronx 1974 1976

query_candidates.reason: A breakbeat playlist can represent the sound material circulating through party practice.
review_risks: Reject modern breakbeat or electronic playlists that do not match the early Bronx context.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find context about a named historical event, scene shift, cultural moment, or local history.
query_candidates.q: Bronx block parties b-boying breakbeat DJing history 1974 1976

request_params.q: Bronx block parties b-boying breakbeat DJing history 1974 1976

query_candidates.reason: The event links DJing, b-boying, and block-party culture as repeatable scene practice.
review_risks: Check for overbroad hip-hop history videos that do not focus on the specified practices.

omitted_intents.reason: No specific song, artist, or release is named in the event.
The event describes a distributed scene practice rather than one named interview subject.

review_notes: Check whether results are historically relevant before adding links.
Reject YouTube Shorts, reaction shorts, teaser clips, and unrelated short-form uploads.
Keep all automatically found links as draft until editorial review.
Verify channel/source quality before promoting any media link to reviewed.
